ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nations" (
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nation */,
  "nation_name" TEXT /* Full name of the nation */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the nation */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the nation's flag */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the nation is located */,
  "fifa_code" TEXT /* FIFA code of the nation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "nation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nation the player represents */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's primary position on the field */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "club" TEXT /* Current club the player is playing for */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the current club */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* Date the player's contract with the current club expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_nation_id FOREIGN KEY ("nation_id") REFERENCES nations ("nation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards received by the player */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Total number of clean sheets (for goalkeepers and defenders) */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Total number of injuries the player has had */,
  "transfer_value" TEXT /* Current estimated transfer value of the player in Euros */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking position of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the ranking is for */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the player is ranked in */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ranking (e.g., overall, attacking, defending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored on the date */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made on the date */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received on the date */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received on the date */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (for goalkeepers and defenders) on the date */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played on the date */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the performance is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the player data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data is accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
